```{r model validation abundance, echo=FALSE, eval=FALSE}
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_psite_combo) + (1|fish_sp_x) + 
                                  offset(sqrt(total_length_mm)), 
                                family = nbinom12(link = "sqrt"), data = hurricane_df3)

models <- list(
  nbinom1log, nbinom1sqrt, nbinom2log, nbinom2sqrt, nbinom12log, nbinom12sqrt,
  nbinom1logoff, nbinom1sqrtoff, nbinom2logoff, nbinom2sqrtoff,
  nbinom12logoff, nbinom12sqrtoff
)

model_names <- c(
  "nbinom1log", "nbinom1sqrt", "nbinom2log", "nbinom2sqrt", "nbinom12log", "nbinom12sqrt",
  "nbinom1logoff", "nbinom1sqrtoff", "nbinom2logoff", "nbinom2sqrtoff",
  "nbinom12logoff", "nbinom12sqrtoff"
)

residual_summaries <- map2_df(models, model_names, function(model, name) {
  sim <- simulateResiduals(fittedModel = model, plot = FALSE)
  data.frame(
    model = name,
    dispersion = testDispersion(sim)$p.value,
    uniformity = testUniformity(sim)$p.value,
    outliers = testOutliers(sim)$p.value,
    AIC = AIC(model)
  )
})

residual_summaries %>%
  arrange(AIC) %>%
  print()
```

## run Transmission Strategy 3 month model
```{r}
# run model 
final_h_life3 <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = final_h_life3, plot = TRUE)
summary(final_h_life3)
plot(parameters(final_h_life3))

emm <- emmeans(final_h_life3, ~ event * timing * life_history)
joint_tests(final_h_life3)

emm <- emmeans(final_h_life3, ~ event * timing * life_history, type = "response")

emmip(final_h_life3, life_history ~ event | timing,
      type = "response",
      CIs = TRUE,
      dodge = 0.3) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Estimated Parasite Abundance by Event, Timing, and Parasite Type",
       y = "Estimated abundance (count scale)",
       x = "Event") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Convert emmeans results to a data frame
emm_df3lc <- as.data.frame(emm)

ggplot(emm_df3lc, aes(x = event, y = response, color = life_history, group = life_history)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = asymp.LCL, ymax = asymp.UCL),
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), width = 0.2) +
  facet_wrap(~ timing) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Estimated Parasite Abundance by Event, Timing, and Parasite Type",
       y = "Estimated abundance (count scale)",
       x = "Event",
       color = "Parasite Type") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# post hurricane direct life cycle history are decreasing

# reorder to see complex LC relationship

hurricane_df3_complex <- hurricane_df3 %>%
  mutate(life_history = forcats::fct_relevel(life_history, "Direct"))


final_h_life3_complex <- glmmTMB(psite_abundance ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo),
                                ziformula = ~ event*timing*life_history + ci + (1|catalog_number) + (1|year_collected/season) + (1|fish_sp_x) + (total_length_mm|fish_psite_combo), 
                                family = nbinom2, data = hurricane_df3_complex)

simulateResiduals(fittedModel = final_h_life3_complex, plot = TRUE)
summary(final_h_life3_complex)
plot(parameters(final_h_life3_complex))

emm <- emmeans(final_h_life3_complex, ~ event * timing * life_history)
joint_tests(final_h_life3_complex)

# Convert emmeans results to a data frame
emm_df3.complex <- as.data.frame(emm)
```

# Plots
## main findings
```{r}
# plot by species of parasite

six <- ggpredict(final_h_abundance, terms = c("event", "timing", "psite_type"))
six <- six %>%
  rename(
    event = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    timing = group,
    psite_type = facet
  )
six$model <- "6 month"


three <- ggpredict(final_h_abundance3, terms = c("event", "timing", "psite_type"))

three <- three %>%
  rename(
    event = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    timing = group,
    psite_type = facet
  ) 
three$model <- "3 month"

combined_preds <- bind_rows(six, three)


#all together
full <- ggplot(combined_preds,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_grid(event ~ model, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 6, 12)) + 
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(pre = "before", post = "after")) +
   scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", 
      "monogenean" = "#A6E000", 
      "trematode" = "#c9ad79", 
      "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "trematode metacercaria",
      "monogenean" = "monogenean",
      "trematode" = "trematode adult",
      "myxozoan" = "myxozoan"
    )
  ) +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")

#meta

combined_preds_meta <- combined_preds %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode_metacercaria"))

meta <- ggplot(combined_preds_meta,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_grid(event ~ model, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 6, 12)) +
 scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", 
      "monogenean" = "#A6E000", 
      "trematode" = "#c9ad79", 
      "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "trematode metacercaria",
      "monogenean" = "monogenean",
      "trematode" = "trematode adult",
      "myxozoan" = "myxozoan"
    )
  )  +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")

# trem

combined_preds_trem <- combined_preds %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("trematode"))

trem <- ggplot(combined_preds_trem,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_grid(event ~ model, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 6, 12)) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", 
      "monogenean" = "#A6E000", 
      "trematode" = "#c9ad79", 
      "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "trematode metacercaria",
      "monogenean" = "monogenean",
      "trematode" = "trematode adult",
      "myxozoan" = "myxozoan"
    )
  )  +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")

# mono

combined_preds_mono <- combined_preds %>% 
  filter(psite_type %in% c("monogenean"))

mono <- ggplot(combined_preds_mono,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_grid(event ~ model, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 6, 12)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(pre = "before", post = "after")) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", 
      "monogenean" = "#A6E000", 
      "trematode" = "#c9ad79", 
      "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "trematode metacercaria",
      "monogenean" = "monogenean",
      "trematode" = "trematode adult",
      "myxozoan" = "myxozoan"
    ))  +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")


# combine into one big plot
hurricane_final_plot <- ggarrange(full, trem, meta, mono, common.legend = TRUE, legend = "top", labels = c("A", "B", "C", "D"))
plot(hurricane_final_plot)

ggsave("hurricane_result.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)

trem
ggsave("trem_hurricane.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)

meta
ggsave("meta_hurricane.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)

mono
ggsave("mono_hurricane.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)

full
ggsave("full_hurricane.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)

# plot life cycle results
lc6 <- ggpredict(final_h_life3, terms = c("event", "timing", "life_history"))
lc6 <- lc6 %>%
  rename(
    event = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    timing = group,
    life_cycle = facet
  )
lc6$model <- "6 month"

lc3 <- ggpredict(final_h_life3, terms = c("event", "timing", "life_history"))

lc3 <- lc3 %>%
  rename(
    event = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    timing = group,
    life_cycle = facet
  ) 
lc3$model <- "3 month"

combined_preds <- bind_rows(lc6, lc3)


#all together
ggplot(combined_preds,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_grid(event ~ model, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = life_cycle),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = life_cycle, linetype = life_cycle),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = life_cycle, group = life_cycle),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 5, 10)) + 
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(pre = "before", post = "after")) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Complex" = "#6161d8", "Direct" = 	"#7cb47c"),
                    labels = c(
      "Complex" = "complex",
      "Direct" = "direct"
    )) +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()	
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")

ggsave("life_cycles.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)

 # plot by species of parasite

six <- ggpredict(hurricane_prevalence_final_psuedo, terms = c("event", "timing"))
six <- six %>%
  rename(
    event = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    timing = group
  )
six$model <- "6 month"


three <- ggpredict(hurricane_prevalence3_final_psuedo, terms = c("event", "timing"))

three <- three %>%
  rename(
    event = x,
    estimate = predicted,
    se = std.error,
    lower = conf.low,
    upper = conf.high,
    timing = group
  ) 
three$model <- "3 month"

combined_preds <- bind_rows(six, three)

combined_preds <- combined_preds %>%
  mutate(psite_type = "myxozoan")

#myxo

myxo <- ggplot(combined_preds,
       aes(x = timing, y = estimate)) +
  facet_grid(event ~ model, scales = "free_y") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, group = psite_type),
                width = 0.05,
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) + 
  geom_line(aes(group = psite_type, linetype = psite_type),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = psite_type, group = psite_type),
             pch = 21, size = 5,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 15)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0, 6, 12)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c(pre = "before", post = "after")) +
 scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "#AFDFEF", 
      "monogenean" = "#A6E000", 
      "trematode" = "#c9ad79", 
      "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
    ),
    labels = c(
      "trematode_metacercaria" = "trematode metacercaria",
      "monogenean" = "monogenean",
      "trematode" = "trematode adult",
      "myxozoan" = "myxozoan"
    )
  )  +
  labs(x = "Timing", y = "Estimate", fill = "Parasite Type") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank()
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")


myxo
ggsave("myxo_hurricane.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)


```

## Make timelines and plots
```{r}
# actual values
df <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/nola misc analysis - timeline dates.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(start_date = as.Date(start_date)) %>%
  mutate(end_date = as.Date(end_date)) %>% 
  select(start_date, end_date, type, name, category) %>% 
   mutate(
    name = factor(name,
      levels = c("control", 
                 unique(name[name != "control"][order(start_date[name != "control"])])))) %>%
  mutate(
    start_date = case_when(
      type == "pre" ~ start_date, 
      type == "post" ~ NA_Date_, 
      TRUE ~ start_date
    ),
    end_date = case_when(
      type == "pre" ~ NA_Date_,  
      type == "post" ~ end_date, 
      TRUE ~ end_date
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(type = factor(type)) %>%
  group_by(name, type, category) %>%
  summarise(
    min_start = min(start_date, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_end = max(end_date, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>% 
  mutate(
    name = factor(name, levels = unique(name)), 
    type_offset = case_when(
      type == "6 month" ~ -0.2,
      type == "3 month" ~ 0.2,
      type == "hurricane" ~ 0,
      type == "tropical storm" ~ 0 
    ),
    y_pos = as.numeric(name) + type_offset
  ) %>%
  mutate(earliest_start = min(min_start, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(name = fct_reorder(name, earliest_start, .desc = TRUE))

# combine 3 and 6 month dfs into one

combined_hurricane_full_df <- bind_rows(
  hurricane_df_abundance_only_full %>% mutate(model = "6-month"),
  hurricane_df3_abundance_only_full %>% mutate(model = "3-month")
)

# Make timeline.

timeline_plot <- ggplot(df, aes(x = min_start, y = 1, color = category)) +
  geom_segment(
    data = df %>% filter(type %in% c("6 month", "3 month")),
    aes(xend = max_end, y = 1, yend = 1),
    size = 20,
    alpha = 1
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = df %>% filter(type %in% c("hurricane", "tropical storm")),
    size = 4,
    alpha = 1, shape = 21, color = "black"
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    breaks = seq(as.Date("1965-01-01"), as.Date("2006-01-01"), by = "5 years"),
    date_labels = "%Y"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(NULL, breaks = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "storm" = "#CB87B4",
    "control" = "#F4B95A"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "",
    x = "",
    y = ""
  ) +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )

timeline_plot
ggsave("ch_only.jpeg", width = 10, height = 3, dpi = 1000)

# lots samples from TUBRI
# Load data about TUBRI lots
psite_data<-read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/TUBRI/data/processed/Full_dataset_with_psite_life_history_info_2024.11.21.csv") %>%
  mutate(
    Date = make_date(year = YearCollected, 
                     month = MonthCollected, 
                     day = DayCollected)
  )

# Make map of lots sampled
options(ggmap.cache.dir = normalizePath("~/ggmap_cache", mustWork = FALSE))
dir.create("~/ggmap_cache", showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

library(ggmap)

bounds<-c(left=-89.855, bottom=30.69, right=-89.81, top=30.81)

mid_x <- (bounds["left"] + bounds["right"]) / 2
bottom_y <- bounds["bottom"]
top_y <- bounds["top"]
mid_y <- (bottom_y + top_y) / 2

base_map <- get_stadiamap(bounds, zoom = 12, maptype = "stamen_terrain_background")


# map with all fish sampled
ggmap(base_map) +
  geom_point(data = hurricane_df6,
             aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, fill = fish_sp_x),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.001),
             shape = 21, size = 4, stroke = 0.5) +
   scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(bounds["left"], bounds["right"]),
    breaks = mid_x,
    labels = round(mid_x, 4) 
  ) +
 scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(bottom_y, top_y),
    breaks = c(bottom_y, mid_y, top_y),
    labels = round(c(bottom_y, mid_y, top_y), 4)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") + 
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black"),
    axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black")
  )

ggsave("river_plot_full.jpeg", width = 3, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)

#####

make_species_map <- function(species_name) {
  ggmap(base_map) +
    geom_point(
      data = hurricane_df6 %>% filter(fish_sp_x == species_name),
      aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, fill = fish_sp_x),
      position = position_jitter(width = 0.001),
      shape = 21, size = 4, stroke = 0.5
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(bounds["left"], bounds["right"]),
      breaks = mid_x,
      labels = round(mid_x, 4)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(bottom_y, top_y),
      breaks = c(bottom_y, mid_y, top_y),
      labels = round(c(bottom_y, mid_y, top_y), 4)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
    xlab("") +
    ylab("") + 
    connor_theme +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)
    )
}

a <- make_species_map("pimvig")
b <- make_species_map("hybnuc") + 
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.y = element_blank() 
  )
c <- make_species_map("notath") + 
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.y = element_blank() 
  )
d <- make_species_map("gamaff") + 
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.y = element_blank() 
  )
e <- make_species_map("ictpun") + 
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.y = element_blank() 
  )
f <- make_species_map("pervig") + 
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.y = element_blank() 
  )
g <- make_species_map("carvel") + 
  theme(
    axis.title.y = element_blank(), 
    axis.text.y = element_blank() 
  )

final_plot <- (a | b | c | d | e | f | g) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

final_plot


ggsave("river_plot.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)

# Making Maps

nola <- data.frame(
  lon = -90.0715,
  lat =  29.9511
)

zoom_bounds <- list(
  xmin = nola$lon - 1,
  xmax = nola$lon + 1,
  ymin = nola$lat - 1.5,
  ymax = nola$lat + 1.5
)

pearl_bounds <- data.frame(
  xmin = -89.855,
  xmax = -89.81,
  ymin = 30.69,
  ymax = 30.81
)

states <- map_data("state")

gulf_states <- subset(
  states,
  region %in% c("louisiana", "mississippi", "alabama")
)

nola_map <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = gulf_states,
    aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
    fill = "grey90",
    color = "grey40",
    linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_rect(
    aes(
      xmin = pearl_bounds$xmin,
      xmax = pearl_bounds$xmax,
      ymin = pearl_bounds$ymin,
      ymax = pearl_bounds$ymax
    ),
    fill = "black",
    color = "black",
    linewidth = 0.5
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = nola,
    aes(x = lon, y = lat),
    shape = 21,
    fill = "black",
    color = "black",
    size = 4
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = (pearl_bounds$xmin + pearl_bounds$xmax) / 2,
    y = pearl_bounds$ymax + 0.15,
    label = "Study Site",
    size = 4
  ) +
  annotate(
    "text",
    x = nola$lon,
    y = nola$lat - 0.15,
    label = "New Orleans",
    size = 4
  ) +
  coord_fixed(
    xlim = c(zoom_bounds$xmin, zoom_bounds$xmax),
    ylim = c(zoom_bounds$ymin, zoom_bounds$ymax)
  ) + 
  connor_theme + 
  theme(
    axis.title = element_blank()
  )

nola_map

ggsave("nola_plot.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)


final_maps <- (
  wrap_elements(nola_map) | wrap_elements(final_plot)) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", widths = c(0.6, 1.6)) +
  plot_annotation(
    tag_levels = "A",
    theme = theme(
      plot.tag = element_text(size = 30, face = "bold")
    )
  ) &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

final_maps

ggsave("final_maps.jpeg", width = 12.5, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)


# Make fish replication plot

fish <- ggplot(data = hurricane_df6, aes(x = date, y = fish_sp_x)) +
  geom_point(data = hurricane_df6, aes(x = date, fill = fish_sp_x),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.15), shape = 21, size = 3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  xlab("") +
  ylab("") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(1965, 2006, by = 5),
    labels = as.character(seq(1965, 2006, by = 5))
  ) +
  connor_theme + 
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black"),
  axis.ticks.x = element_line(color = "black"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10)
  )

# Make final plot
x_scale_shared <- scale_x_date(
  limits = as.Date(c("1965-01-01", "2006-01-01")),
  breaks = seq(as.Date("1965-01-01"), as.Date("2006-01-01"), by = "5 years"),
  date_labels = "%Y"
) 

timeline_plot <- timeline_plot + x_scale_shared 
fish <- fish + x_scale_shared

final_timeline <- wrap_plots(
  timeline_plot, fish, ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 2))
final_timeline

ggsave("timeline.jpeg", width = 12, height = (9/16)*11, dpi = 1000)
```


## Make tables for all the model outputs -- glmmTMB
```{r}
# the models:  listed type gives the result for that target one -- i.e. a6meta will give us the meta result (mono in reference)

a3meta <- final_h_abundance3
a6meta <- final_h_abundance 
a3mono <- final_h_abundance3mono
a6mono <- final_h_abundancemono
p3 <- hurricane_prevalence3_final_psuedo
p6 <- hurricane_prevalence_final_psuedo
lc3direct <- final_h_life3
lc6direct <- final_h_life6
lc3complex <- final_h_life3_complex
lc6complex <- final_h_life6_complex
a3season <- season_model3
a6season <- season_model6
p3season <- season_model3p
p6season <- season_model6p
lc3season <- season_model3.lc
lc6season <- season_model6.lc

models <- list(
  a3meta       = list(model = a3meta,       timeframe = "3_month", response = "abundance"),
  a6meta       = list(model = a6meta,       timeframe = "6_month", response = "abundance"),
  a3mono       = list(model = a3mono,       timeframe = "3_month", response = "abundance"),
  a6mono       = list(model = a6mono,       timeframe = "6_month", response = "abundance"),
  p3           = list(model = p3,           timeframe = "3_month", response = "prevalence"),
  p6           = list(model = p6,           timeframe = "6_month", response = "prevalence"),
  lc3direct    = list(model = lc3direct,    timeframe = "3_month", response = "life_cycle"),
  lc6direct    = list(model = lc6direct,    timeframe = "6_month", response = "life_cycle"),
  lc3complex   = list(model = lc3complex,   timeframe = "3_month", response = "life_cycle"),
  lc6complex   = list(model = lc6complex,   timeframe = "6_month", response = "life_cycle"),
  a3season     = list(model = a3season,     timeframe = "3_month", response = "abundance"),
  a6season     = list(model = a6season,     timeframe = "6_month", response = "abundance"),
  p3season     = list(model = p3season,     timeframe = "3_month", response = "prevalence"),
  p6season     = list(model = p6season,     timeframe = "6_month", response = "prevalence"),
  lc3season    = list(model = lc3season,    timeframe = "3_month", response = "life_cycle"),
  lc6season    = list(model = lc6season,    timeframe = "6_month", response = "life_cycle")
)


extract_model_terms <- function(x, model_name) {

  td <- broom::tidy(x$model)
  cond <- td %>%
    filter(component == "cond", effect == "fixed") %>%
    mutate(component = "conditional")
  zi <- td %>%
    filter(component == "zi", effect == "fixed") %>%
    mutate(component = "zero_inflated")

  bind_rows(cond, zi) %>%
    mutate(
      model     = model_name,
      timeframe = x$timeframe,
      response  = x$response,
      OR        = exp(estimate),
      CI_lower  = exp(estimate - 1.96 * std.error),
      CI_upper  = exp(estimate + 1.96 * std.error)
    ) %>%
    select(
      model,
      timeframe,
      response,
      component,
      term,
      OR,
      CI_lower,
      CI_upper,
      std.error,
      statistic,
      estimate,
      p.value
    )
}

all_model_results <- imap_dfr(
  models,
  ~ tryCatch(
      extract_model_terms(.x, .y),
      error = function(e) {
        message("Skipping model: ", .y)
        NULL
      }
    )
)


write_csv(
  all_model_results,
  "all_models_conditional_and_ZI_results.csv"
)

```

Make tables for all the model outputs -- emmeans joint tests
```{r}
# the models:  listed type gives the result for that target one -- i.e. a6meta will give us the meta result (mono in reference)
a3meta_jt <- joint_tests(final_h_abundance3)
a6meta_jt <- joint_tests(final_h_abundance) 
a3mono_jt <- joint_tests(final_h_abundance3mono)
a6mono_jt <- joint_tests(final_h_abundancemono)
lc3direct_jt <- joint_tests(final_h_life3)
lc6direct_jt <- joint_tests(final_h_life6)
lc3complex_jt <- joint_tests(final_h_life3_complex)
lc6complex_jt <- joint_tests(final_h_life6_complex)

models <- list(
  a3meta_jt       = list(model = a3meta_jt,       timeframe = "3_month", response = "abundance"),
  a6meta_jt       = list(model = a6meta_jt,       timeframe = "6_month", response = "abundance"),
  a3mono_jt       = list(model = a3mono_jt,       timeframe = "3_month", response = "abundance"),
  a6mono_jt       = list(model = a6mono_jt,       timeframe = "6_month", response = "abundance"),
  lc3direct_jt    = list(model = lc3direct_jt,    timeframe = "3_month", response = "life_cycle"),
  lc6direct_jt    = list(model = lc6direct_jt,    timeframe = "6_month", response = "life_cycle"),
  lc3complex_jt   = list(model = lc3complex_jt,   timeframe = "3_month", response = "life_cycle"),
  lc6complex_jt   = list(model = lc6complex_jt,   timeframe = "6_month", response = "life_cycle"))


extract_joint_tests <- function(x, model_name) {
  jt <- as.data.frame(x$model)
  names(jt)[1] <- "term"
  jt %>%
    mutate(
      model     = model_name,
      timeframe = x$timeframe,
      response  = x$response
    ) %>%
    rename_with(~ "df_num",   .cols = any_of("df1")) %>%
    rename_with(~ "df_denom", .cols = any_of("df2")) %>%
    rename_with(~ "f_ratio",  .cols = any_of("F.ratio")) %>%
    rename_with(~ "chi_sq",   .cols = any_of("Chisq")) %>%
    rename_with(~ "p_value",  .cols = any_of("p.value"))
}

all_joint_tests <- imap_dfr(
  models,
  ~ extract_joint_tests(.x, .y)
)

write.csv(
  all_joint_tests,
  "all_models_joint_tests_results.csv")
```


Total fish dissected for this analysis:
```{r}
fish_done <- combined_hurricane_full_df %>% 
  summarise(unique_catalogs = n_distinct(individual_fish_id))
```

## Plot seasonality abundance
```{r}
# add facet label to seasons

ha3.season <- ha3.season %>% 
  mutate(duration = "3 months")

ha.season <- ha.season %>% 
  mutate(duration = "6 months")

timeline_df <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/nola misc analysis - timeline dates.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(start_date = as.Date(start_date)) %>%
  mutate(end_date = as.Date(end_date)) %>% 
  select(start_date, end_date, type, enso_event, enso_strength) %>% 
  mutate(
    start_month = month(start_date),
    start_day = day(start_date),
    end_month = month(end_date),
    end_day = day(end_date),
    rep_year = 2025,
    start_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, start_month, start_day),
    end_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, end_month, end_day)
  ) %>% 
  filter(!type %in% c("6 month", "3 month"))



p1 <- ggplot(timeline_df, 
       aes(x = start_date_rep, xend = end_date_rep, y = type, yend = type, color = type)) +
  geom_segment(size = 3, alpha = 1) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "hurricane" = "#CB87E9",
    "tropical storm" = "#CB87B4",
    "trematode" = "#c9ad79",
    "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
  )) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "")  +
  connor_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(
  panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  strip.text = element_blank(), 
  legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  legend.title = element_blank()
)

p2 <- ggplot(ha.season,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
  panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  axis.text.x = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
)

season6 <- (p1 / p2 + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.2), guides = "collect")) & 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
 
 # 3 month
season3 <- ggplot(ha3.season,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
 scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.position = "none", 
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

final_plot <- wrap_plots(season6, season3, ncol = 1, guides = "collect") + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") 
  

final_plot


ggsave("seasonality.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)

```


## transmission strategy plot for seasonality
```{r}
## plot seasonality for the total samples taken and used in the life cycle analyses
ha.season.lc3 <- ha.season.lc3 %>% 
  mutate(duration = "3 months")

ha.season.lc <- ha.season.lc %>% 
  mutate(duration = "6 months")

timeline_df <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/nola misc analysis - timeline dates.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(start_date = as.Date(start_date)) %>%
  mutate(end_date = as.Date(end_date)) %>% 
  select(start_date, end_date, type, enso_event, enso_strength) %>% 
  mutate(
    start_month = month(start_date),
    start_day = day(start_date),
    end_month = month(end_date),
    end_day = day(end_date),
    rep_year = 2025,
    start_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, start_month, start_day),
    end_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, end_month, end_day)
  ) %>% 
  filter(!type %in% c("6 month", "3 month"))



p1 <- ggplot(timeline_df, 
       aes(x = start_date_rep, xend = end_date_rep, y = type, yend = type, color = type)) +
  geom_segment(size = 3, alpha = 1) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) + 
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "hurricane" = "#CB87E9",
    "tropical storm" = "#CB87B4",
    "trematode" = "#c9ad79",
    "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
  )) +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "")  +
  connor_theme +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank()) +
  theme(
  panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  strip.text = element_blank(), 
  legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  legend.title = element_blank()
)

p2 <- ggplot(ha.season.lc,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
  panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
  axis.text.x = element_blank(),
  axis.ticks.x = element_blank()
)

season6 <- (p1 / p2 + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.2), guides = "collect")) & 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
 
 # 3 month
season3 <- ggplot(ha.season.lc3,
       aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(height = 0.2), shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2) +
  scale_x_date(
    limits = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26")),
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
 scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = '') +
  labs(x = "", y = "", fill = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.position = "none", 
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
  )

final_plot <- wrap_plots(season6, season3, ncol = 1, guides = "collect") + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") 
  

final_plot


ggsave("seasonality_lc.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)

```

## Make myxozoan seasonality plot
```{r}
## plot seasonality for the total samples taken and used in the life cycle analyses
hp.season.3 <- hp3.season %>%  
  mutate(duration = "3 months")

hp.season.p6 <- hp.season %>% 
  mutate(duration = "6 months")

timeline_df <- read.csv("~/Desktop/UW/Chapter1 NOLA/datasets/nola misc analysis - timeline dates.csv") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>%
  mutate(start_date = as.Date(start_date)) %>%
  mutate(end_date = as.Date(end_date)) %>% 
  select(start_date, end_date, type, enso_event, enso_strength) %>% 
  mutate(
    start_month = month(start_date),
    start_day = day(start_date),
    end_month = month(end_date),
    end_day = day(end_date),
    rep_year = 2025,
    start_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, start_month, start_day),
    end_date_rep = make_date(rep_year, end_month, end_day)
  ) %>% 
  filter(!type %in% c("6 month", "3 month"))



p1 <- ggplot(
  timeline_df,
  aes(
    x = start_date_rep, xend = end_date_rep,
    y = type, yend = type,
    color = type
  )
) +
  geom_segment(size = 3, alpha = 1) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26"))
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "hurricane" = "#CB87E9",
    "tropical storm" = "#CB87B4",
    "trematode" = "#c9ad79",
    "myxozoan" = "#07c3c5"
  )) +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x  = element_line(),
    panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    strip.text = element_blank(),
    legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.title = element_blank()
  )

p2 <- ggplot(
  hp.season.p6,
  aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)
) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_jitter(height = 0.2),
    shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26"))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = "") +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    axis.text.x  = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.line.x  = element_line()
  )
 
season6 <- (p1 / p2 + 
  plot_layout(heights = c(1, 1.2), guides = "collect")) & 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(),
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
    legend.position = "top"
  )

 # 3 month
season3 <- ggplot(
  hp.season.3,
  aes(x = month_day_date, y = event, fill = fish_sp_x)
) +
  facet_grid(duration ~ ., switch = "x") +
  geom_violin(scale = "count", trim = FALSE) +
  geom_point(
    position = position_jitter(height = 0.2),
    shape = 21, size = 3, stroke = 0.2
  ) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_labels = "%b",
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    expand = c(0.01, 0)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = as.Date(c("2025-01-03", "2025-12-26"))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = my_pal, name = "") +
  labs(x = "", y = "") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    panel.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.spacing = unit(0, "pt"),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line.x = element_line()
  )

final_plot <- wrap_plots(season6, season3, ncol = 1, guides = "collect") + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") 
  

final_plot
ggsave("seaonality_prevalence.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)
```

## add plot of fish body size through time
```{r}
y_scales <- list(
  fish_sp_x == "carvel" ~ scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(25, 90),
    breaks = c(25, 90)
  ),
  fish_sp_x == "gamaff" ~ scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(25, 55),
    breaks = c(25, 55)
  ),
  fish_sp_x == "hybnuc" ~ scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(30, 125),
    breaks = c(30, 125)
  ),
  fish_sp_x == "ictpun" ~ scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(30, 140),
    breaks = c(30, 140)
  ),
  fish_sp_x == "notath" ~ scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(30, 100),
    breaks = c(30, 100)
  ),
  fish_sp_x == "pervig" ~ scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(25, 60),
    breaks = c(25, 60)
  ),
  fish_sp_x == "pimvig" ~ scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(25, 100),
    breaks = c(25, 100)
  )
)

fish_size <- ggplot(full_data,
       aes(x = year_collected, y = total_length_mm)) + 
  facet_wrap(~ fish_sp_x, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  facetted_pos_scales(
    y = y_scales) +
  geom_point(aes(fill = fish_sp_x, group = fish_sp_x),
             pch = 21, size = 3,
             position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    geom_smooth(method = "lm",
              se = FALSE,
              color = "black",
              linewidth = 0.5) +
 # stat_poly_eq(
  #  aes(label = paste(..rr.label..)),
  #  formula = y ~ x,
 #   parse = TRUE,
 #   label.x.npc = "left",
 #   label.y.npc = 0.9) +
  labs(x = "Year Collected", y = "Total Length (mm)", fill = "Fish Species") +
  connor_theme +
  theme(
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  ) +
  guides(linetype = "none")

fish_size
ggsave("fish_size.jpeg", width = 10, height = (9/16)*10, dpi = 1000)
```
